attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring or one-time remote agent ("run this every Monday", "open a cleanup PR for X in 2 weeks"), or to manage existing routines. ALSO OFFER PROACTIVELY: after you finish work that has a natural future follow-up, end your reply with a one-line offer to schedule a background agent to do it. Strong signals: a feature flag / gate / experiment / staged rollout was just shipped (offer a one-time agent in ~2 weeks to open a cleanup PR or evaluate results), a new alert/monitor was created (offer a recurring agent to triage it), a TODO/migration with a "remove once X" condition was left behind (offer a one-time agent to do the removal). Skip the offer for refactors, bug fixes, and anything that is done once it ships. Name a concrete action and cadence ("in 2 weeks", "every Monday") and only offer when the run just succeeded — do not pitch a schedule for something that has not happened yet.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

217	                                                            <GradientStop Color="#FF585858" Offset="1"/>

219	                                                    </Setter.Value>
220	                                                </Setter>
221	                                                <Setter TargetName="gloss" Property="Opacity" Value="0.3"/>
222	                                            </Trigger>
223	                                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
224	                                    </ControlTemplate>

227	                        </Style>

233	                    <ToggleButton x:Name="tb_der_trasero" Content="Derecho Trasero"   Style="{StaticResource LatchButtonStyle}" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="245,90,0,0"  VerticalAlignment="Top" Click="tb_der_trasero_Click"/>
234	                    <ToggleButton x:Name="tb_der_slide"   Content="Derecho Slide"     Style="{StaticResource LatchButtonStyle}" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="245,150,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Click="tb_der_slide_Click"/>
235	                    <ToggleButton x:Name="tb_Cortina"     Content="Cortina"           Style="{StaticResource LatchButtonStyle}" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="130,215,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Click="tb_Cortina_Click"/>

<Window
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008"
        xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006"
        xmlns:local="clr-namespace:BaseProject"
        xmlns:Data="clr-namespace:System.Data;assembly=System.Data" x:Class="BaseProject.W_Engineering"
        mc:Ignorable="d"
        Title="W_Engineering"  Height="811.322" Width="469.387" Background="SteelBlue" FontFamily="Century Gothic" Closing="Window_Closing">
    <Grid>
        <Label Margin="10,10,10,10" Background="Black" Height="100" VerticalAlignment="Top" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalContentAlignment="Center" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center">
            <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" FontSize="42" Foreground="White"><Run Text="Enginneering"/></TextBlock>
        </Label>
        <TabControl HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"  VerticalAlignment="Stretch" Margin="25,120,25,25" >
            <TabItem x:Name="tab_PN" Header="Numeros de parte" Visibility="Visible">
                <Grid Background="DimGray">
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="91*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="116*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <Label Content="Numero de parte" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="7,166,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="113"/>
                    <Label Content="Modelo" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="26,195,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="60" Visibility="Hidden"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="txb_NP" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Height="23" Margin="124,167,0,0" TextWrapping="Wrap" Text="" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="60" PreviewTextInput="txb_Nombre_PreviewTextInput" Grid.ColumnSpan="2"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="cb_Chamber" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="125,199,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="59" Visibility="Hidden" Grid.ColumnSpan="2">
                        <ListBoxItem Content="1"/>
                        <ListBoxItem Content="2"/>
                        <!--<ListBoxItem Content="3"/>
                        <ListBoxItem Content="4"/>-->
                    </ComboBox>
                    <Button x:Name="btn_Save" Content="Guardar" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="54,195,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="75" Click="btn_Save_Click" Grid.Column="1" />
                    <DataGrid x:Name="dg_PartNumbers" AutoGenerateColumns="False"  HorizontalAlignment="Left" ItemsSource="{Binding}" Height="209" Margin="10,224,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="314"  IsReadOnly="True" SelectionChanged="Dg_PartNumbers_SelectionChanged_1" KeyDown="Dg_PartNumbers_KeyDown_1" Grid.ColumnSpan="2">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Binding="{Binding PartNumber}"  ClipboardContentBinding="{x:Null}" Header="Número de parte" Width="50*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Binding="{Binding Model}" ClipboardContentBinding="{x:Null}" Header="Modelo" Width="150"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                    <Label HorizontalAlignment="Left" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="10,10,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="314" Height="54" Grid.ColumnSpan="2">
                        <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow">Solo se deben ingresar los ultimos 4 digitos del numero de parte. Luego seleccionar el modelo correspondiente</TextBlock>
                    </Label>
                    <Label HorizontalAlignment="Left" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="13,68,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="100" Height="25" Visibility="Hidden">
                        <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow"><Run Text="1  = FuseBar"/></TextBlock>
                    </Label>
                    <Label HorizontalAlignment="Left" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="118,68,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="100" Height="39" Visibility="Hidden" Grid.ColumnSpan="2">
                        <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow"><Run Text="2  =  FuseBar-Option1"/></TextBlock>
                    </Label>
                    <Label HorizontalAlignment="Left" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="46,69,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="100" Height="39" Grid.Column="1">
                        <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Text="3  =  FuseBar-Option2" Visibility="Hidden"/>
                    </Label>
                    <Label HorizontalAlignment="Left" HorizontalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="103,112,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Width="121" Height="39" Grid.ColumnSpan="2">
                        <TextBlock TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Text="4  =  FuseBar-Option1-Option2" Visibility="Hidden"/>
                    </Label>
                    <CheckBox x:Name="check_AllModels" Content="Todos los modelos" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="27,172,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Visibility="Hidden" Grid.Column="1"/>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>
            <TabItem x:Name="tab_EPS" Header="EPS" Visibility="Visible">
                <Grid Background="DimGray">

                    <Label x:Name="lbl_Encoder_Copy22" Content="Posicion 12"  Width="83" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="291,307,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Top" Visibility="Collapsed"/>

                                                    BorderThickness="2"
                                                    BorderBrush="#FF1A1A1A">

                                                    Height="22"
                                                    VerticalAlignment="Top">

                                                        <GradientStop Color="#00FFFFFF" Offset="1"/>
                                                    </LinearGradientBrush>
